steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: To effectively describe how DLS cures 3D objects, an answer must trace the actual mechanism from start to finish. The notes show the sequence: UV light projects into liquid resin → layers build up → final baking.

steps.title: Find the choice that captures this sequence
steps.content: Choice C traces the mechanism precisely: UV light projects into liquid resin (initiating curing), layers build up, then the object bakes in an oven. The other choices either wrongly place curing in the dead zone, skip the UV-into-resin initiation, or scramble the sequence. That matches choice C — C is correct.
